zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Bisset於1179年出生在英國武斯特斯爾吉德米斯特時，她的父親Henry Biset24歲，母親Aubrey fitzRichard21歲。她於1203年與Roger la Zouche Lord of Ashby在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾阿什比 德 拉 祖結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1232年1月28日在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾阿什比 德 拉 祖享年53歲。

nameMeanings.name: Bisset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): variant of   Bissett  .
French: from a diminutive of Old French bisse ‘fine linen’ (see Bisson ).

variants.name: Bissett
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French biset ‘dark’, a diminutive of bis (see Biss ).

Altered form of French Bizet: nickname for someone with a dark complexion, derived from bis ‘grayish-brown’. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t. Compare Bissette .

History: The surname Bissett (see 1 above) was brought to Scotland from Nottinghamshire c. 1175 by Henricus Byset, an Englishman who became a retainer of King William the Lion. — It was Jean George Bizet from Haute-Saône, France, whose surname was changed to Bissett (see 2 above) after his immigration to NS, Canada, in 1752.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Bisset was born in 1179, in Kidderminster, Worcestershire, England, her father, Henry Biset, was 24 and her mother, Aubrey fitzRichard, was 21. She married Roger la Zouche Lord of Ashby in 1203, in Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 28 January 1232, in Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53.

Elle a épousé Roger la Zouche Lord of Ashby en 1203, à Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 janvier 1232, à Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans.

ko.Ashby-de-la-Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 애스h비 데 라 즈우치
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Bisset(이)가 1179년 영국 워스스터실르 키더민스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Biset(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aubrey fitzRichard(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1203년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 애스h비 데 라 즈우치에서 Roger la Zouche Lord of Ashby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1232년 1월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 애스h비 데 라 즈우치에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Bisset родилась в 1179 г. в местности киддирминстир, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Biset было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Aubrey fitzRichard, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger la Zouche Lord of Ashby в 1203 г. в местности ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 28 января 1232 г. в местности ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет.
